```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;background:#DCE9FA;padding:0.25em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">Layer 03 · Execution Orchestration</span>
  <div style="margin-top:0.55em;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;">A complete task usually has <span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-weight:700;">five stages</span>:</div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.3em;margin-bottom:0.7em;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;width:5em;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #5654A2;background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">1</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;text-align:center;line-height:1.3;">Understand goal</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;width:5em;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #3A7DC9;background:#FFFFFF;color:#3A7DC9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">2</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;text-align:center;line-height:1.3;">Judge info</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;width:5em;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #C4881A;background:#FFFFFF;color:#C4881A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">3</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;text-align:center;line-height:1.3;">Continue analysis</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;width:5em;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #2C8475;background:#FFFFFF;color:#2C8475;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">4</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;text-align:center;line-height:1.3;">Generate output</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;width:5em;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #4A7A5A;background:#FFFFFF;color:#4A7A5A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">5</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;text-align:center;line-height:1.3;">Check output</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">
  <div style="background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F2B5A8;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A2418;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">⚠ risk · info insufficient</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Loop back &amp; gather before continuing.</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F2B5A8;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A2418;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">⚠ risk · output not satisfying</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Re-correct or restart, don't ship.</div>
  </div>
 </div>

</div>
```
